description_long: This is a modern, boxy house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a combination of white and light brown exterior finishes. The structure appears to be two stories tall, with large rectangular windows distributed asymmetrically across the facade. The front of the house includes a small set of steps leading to a recessed entryway, and the property is bordered by a low wall and landscaping with several medium-sized trees. The ground level is partially clad in a brick or stone material, contrasting with the smooth white upper story. The house is set back from the street with a paved driveway or walkway leading up to the entrance. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric forms and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, white and light brown exterior, large windows, and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, brick-clad lower level, white upper story, and landscaping with trees on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile, flat roof, and dense tree coverage at the rear of the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a mostly white facade, minimal window openings, and a continuation of the landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the driveway or walkway, side windows, and a tree near the entrance.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with steps, minimal overhang, and a simple modern door
